message: Create a full-stack URL shortener web application with the following requirements: 1) A FastAPI backend with SQLite database that has endpoints for creating short URLs (POST /shorten with a JSON body containing the long URL), redirecting short URLs (GET /{short_code}), and getting URL stats (GET /stats/{short_code} returning click count and creation date). 2) A simple HTML/CSS/JS frontend with a form to submit URLs, display the shortened URL, and a stats page. 3) Use a clean project structure with separate files for models, routes, and database setup. Include proper error handling for invalid URLs and non-existent short codes.

Include proper error handling for invalid URLs and non-existent short codes.
